content_sections.heading: UPSC Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) Recruitment 2026 notification released for 186 posts of Drug Inspector. Candidates with B.Pharma Can Apply Online. The Online application process for UPSC Recruitment 2026 has started on 27-06-2026 and will remain open until 17-07-2026. The candidate shall apply online through UPSC website, upsc.gov.in/.

content_sections.heading: UPSC Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Download
content_sections.text: The UPSC Drug Inspector Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF has been released on 25-06-2026 at https://www.upsc.gov.in/. Check the complete job details, vacancy, age limit, application fee, selection process and how to apply from the article. You can Check all Latest Sarkari Result Updates of All Central Government Jobs and State Government Jobs. UPSC Drug Inspector Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Name of the Post : UPSC Drug Inspector Online Form 2026 Post Date : 25-06-2026 Total Vacancy : 186 Posts Brief Information: The Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) has announced a notification for the recruitment of Drug Inspector Vacancy. Eligible Candidates who are interested in the vacancy details & completed all eligibility criteria can read the notification & Apply.

rows.union_public_service_commission_upsc_adv: Application Fee For General/OBC/EWS male candidates : Rs 25 Female candidates of all categories, SC, ST, and Persons with Benchmark Disability (PwBD) candidates : Nil
